name: claude-code-hive
description: Claude Code plugin assets for Agent Hive
author: tctinh

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-plugin-assets.mjs && node scripts/prepare-workspace-hive-mcp.mjs && node scripts/verify-plugin-assets.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/generate-plugin-assets.mjs && node --test scripts/prepare-workspace-hive-mcp.test.mjs scripts/launch-hive-mcp.test.mjs && node scripts/prepare-workspace-hive-mcp.mjs && node scripts/verify-plugin-assets.mjs
